title: India Tests New Hypersonic Missile System
text: India successfully tested a domestically developed hypersonic missile capable of Mach 8+ speeds, marking a significant milestone in the country's defense modernization program. The DRDO-developed system was launched from a test facility on the eastern coast.

title: OpenAI Announces GPT-5 with Enhanced Reasoning
text: OpenAI has unveiled GPT-5, its latest large language model featuring significantly improved reasoning capabilities. The model demonstrates near-human performance on complex mathematical and scientific benchmarks.

title: India Tests Hypersonic Missile in Major Defense Milestone
text: In a landmark achievement, India has successfully tested a new hypersonic missile system developed by DRDO. The game-changing weapon can travel at speeds exceeding Mach 8, placing India among an elite group of nations with hypersonic capabilities.

title: RBI Holds Interest Rates Steady Amid Global Uncertainty
text: The Reserve Bank of India maintained its benchmark repo rate at 6.5% for the eighth consecutive meeting, citing concerns over global economic uncertainty and persistent food inflation.
